title: Whispers of the Archive
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing8: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing2: chest=✗ ears=✗  →  non_reactive
Chest reacts to G+S. Ears react to R+S. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [4, 8]. Alch: ing4→npN, ing8→pnP.
